title: 🎉 Paper Accepted by ICML 2026
excerpt: Our paper "When Replanning Becomes the Bottleneck: Budgeted Replanning for Embodied Agents" has been accepted by the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning.
excerptHtml: Our paper "When Replanning Becomes the Bottleneck: Budgeted Replanning for Embodied Agents" has been accepted by The 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning.
